_comment: Accepted local data-quality audit exceptions. Keep explicit IDs small; use accepted_issue_types only for categories whose behavior is intentionally non-actionable.

accepted_issue_types.catalog_box_set_missing_spine: Criterion box set pages do not always map to a standalone public spine in the catalog data; regular /films/ spine gaps remain actionable.
accepted_issue_types.pick_box_set_missing_spine: Box set picks can intentionally carry a /boxsets/ URL without a pick-level catalog_spine; regular /films/ spine gaps remain actionable.

duplicate_title_year_director.in the mood for love|2000|wong kar-wai: Reviewed on 2026-06-16; picked rows use the Criterion-backed fa-yeung-nin-wa catalog entry, while in-the-mood-for-love is an unpicked legacy alias.
duplicate_title_year_director.playtime|1967|jacques tati: Reviewed on 2026-06-16; play-time is the Criterion-backed catalog entry, while playtime is an unpicked legacy alias.

film_missing_tmdb_id.che: Criterion's Che is a two-part feature; the previous single TMDB ID was only a making-of documentary, so no single TMDB movie ID is accepted without a richer multi-part model.
film_missing_tmdb_id.science-is-fiction-23-films-by-jean-pain: Multi-short collection; no single locally verified TMDB entity is accepted without a richer contained-films model.
film_missing_tmdb_id.symbiopsychotaxiplasm-two-takes: Two-film release; no single locally verified TMDB entity is accepted without a richer contained-films model.
film_missing_tmdb_id.the-complete-mr-arkadin: Multi-version release; no single locally verified TMDB entity is accepted without a richer contained-versions model.

film_missing_imdb_id.a-hollis-frampton-odyssey: Multi-film collection; TMDB has no verified single IMDb ID to backfill locally.
film_missing_imdb_id.che: Two-part feature with separate IMDb records; leave blank until the data model supports multi-part external IDs.
film_missing_imdb_id.les-blank-always-for-pleasure: Multi-film collection; TMDB has no verified single IMDb ID to backfill locally.
film_missing_imdb_id.martha-graham-dance-on-film: Multi-film program; TMDB has no verified single IMDb ID to backfill locally.
film_missing_imdb_id.science-is-fiction-23-films-by-jean-pain: Multi-short collection; no single locally verified IMDb ID is accepted without a richer contained-films model.
film_missing_imdb_id.symbiopsychotaxiplasm-two-takes: Two-film release; no single locally verified IMDb ID is accepted without a richer contained-films model.
film_missing_imdb_id.the-complete-mr-arkadin: Multi-version release; no single locally verified IMDb ID is accepted without a richer contained-versions model.

film_missing_genres.a-hollis-frampton-odyssey: Multi-film collection; the exact TMDB entity has no genre payload, so this remains a known completeness gap.
film_missing_genres.les-blank-always-for-pleasure: Multi-film collection; the exact TMDB entity has no genre payload, so this remains a known completeness gap.
film_missing_genres.science-is-fiction-23-films-by-jean-pain: Multi-short collection; no single locally verified TMDB entity is accepted without a richer contained-films model.
film_missing_genres.symbiopsychotaxiplasm-two-takes: Two-film release; no single locally verified TMDB entity is accepted without a richer contained-films model.
film_missing_genres.the-complete-mr-arkadin: Multi-version release; no single locally verified TMDB entity is accepted without a richer contained-versions model.

film_missing_director.the-golden-age-of-television: Anthology release with multiple directors; leave the aggregate director blank until the data model supports contained-film credits.

notes.guest_incomplete_quote_coverage:data/pic: Audio fallback checked on 2026-06-15; remaining unquoted visit-1 picks appear to be silent pickups rather than verbal mentions.
